title: Menace of Darth Maul
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{ExpansionPack |image=[[File:Menace_of_Darth_Maul_YJCCG_box.jpg]] |title=''Menace of Darth Maul'' |game=[[Young Jedi Collectible Card Game]]{{Decipher|url=calendars/product/index.html|text=The Decipher Calendar}} |publisher=[[Decipher]] |release date=[[May 12]] [[1999]] |figures= |cards= |isbn= |upc= |timeline= |preceded by= |followed by=''[[The Jedi Council]]'' }} '''''Menace of Darth Maul''''' was the first expansion card pack of the [[Young Jedi Collectible Card Game]] produced by [[Decipher]], released on [[May 12]], [[1999]]. It was based around [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], specifically elements relating to the planet of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Many of the cards were yellow-bordered, the color assigned to the planet of Tatooine. Only a few cards (like [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Nass]] and related [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]]) were actually different color. This expansion contained 140 cards and 18 diffraction foil cards. ==Media== ===Card list=== {{ScrollBox|content= #[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Padawan/Legends|Young]]
